# ntfy Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "ntfy" {
  url      = "http://localhost:80"
  username = "admin"
  password = "admin-password"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Admin password for the ntfy server. Can be set via `NTFY_PASSWORD` environment variable.
- `url` (String) The URL of the ntfy server. Defaults to `http://localhost:80`. Can be set via `NTFY_URL` environment variable.
- `username` (String) Admin username for the ntfy server. Defaults to `admin`. Can be set via `NTFY_USERNAME` environment variable.
